title: Le chant des hommes
overview: A handful of migrants without papers decide to start a hunger strike. Day by day, overcoming the violence that they inflict upon themselves, they discover the greatness of their true cause. From this realisation they learn to affirm their common humanity.

trailers.title: LE CHANT DES HOMMES de Bénédicte Liénard et Mary Jimenez
